titleStmt.title: SII 30.10: original edition by N. Marxia Gandhi, A. Padmavathy and S. Swaminathan
No. 10. (A.R. No. 88 of 1915.) Tirumurugaṉpūṇḍi, Avinashi Taluk, Coimbatore District. Muruganātha temple-on the south wall of the central shrine King's name and year not mentioned: 14th c A.D.

summary.p: Built in. This inscription records a gift of land and a house-site to Kaṟpagachchēri Kuṇḍūr Piḷḷaṉ alias Sūryabhaṭṭaṉ. The boundaries of the lands and house site are mentioned. Ulaguyyavaḻu[dāṉ] the pontiff of a maṭha (māḍāpattiyam), figures as one of the signatories.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svastiśrī . caṇdheśvaran Olai sāgara
ñ ceytāṉ (ceytāṉ) Aṟaṅkāttāṉ pā
Ādeśam nambhikaḷil coḻamaṇṭalattu vaṭakarai virutarācapayaṅkara
kaṟpakacceri kuṇṭurppiḷḷa(ṉ)ṉāṉa sūryyabhaṭṭaṉukku Udakapūrvva
nām Ivaṉukku Udakam paṇṇik kuṭutta maṉaiyum viḷainilamumāvatu
ta maṉaikku Ellai Āvatu vaṭakkil tiruvitiyil va
lakuyyavantāṉ maṉaikku meṟkun teṉpāṟkellai
ḻakkum vaṭapāṟkellai kuḷaṅkaraikkut teṟkum Āka Innāṉkellaikkuḷppa
ttuccarameṉṟu perkūvappaṭṭa maṉai Iṉnilattukku Ellaiyāvatu
vaṭakku melpāṟkellai tiruvaraṅkavatikku kiḻakku vaṭapāṟkellai vāykkālukkum tiruva
Aiṅkalamum Inta maṉainilamum Ivaṉukku Udakapūrvva dharmmadānamāka Innāḷ mutal kuṭuttom Ippaṭikku I
peṟpaṭṭa sarvva prāptikaḷukkum Urittākak kaṭavatākavum Ippaṭik kuṭutta maṉainilattukkum
ḷḷa Aḷavu candrātityavaraiyum sarvvamānyamāka Aṉupavittup potak kaṭavatākavum I
vaḻi prāpti maṟṟum Inta maṉaiyālum viḷainilam vitai Aiṅkalattālum varum Eppeṟpa
mākak ka ntamaṉaiyum viḷainilam vitai Aiṅkalamum candrātityavarai sarvvamānyamāka
ṇṭu Anu paṭikku kuṭuttom Ippaṭikku Aruḷāl Ippaṭi
Eḻuttu Ippaṭikku Ivai māṭāpattiyam Ulakuyyavaḻutāṉ Eḻuttu Ippaṭi
vayiravapperumāṉ Eḻuttu Ippaṭikku Ivai mutaliyāṉ Eḻuttu Ippaṭikku Ivai
n śrīkaraṇattāṉ Eḻuttu Itu paṉmāheśvara rakṣai §
Digital edition of SII 30.10 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
